items.name: 葛尾三匹獅子舞
items.location: 上葛尾・下葛尾行政区

en.description_en: A three-lion dance classified as an intangible folk cultural property. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1973-04-28. It is located in the Kamikatsurao and Shimokatsurao administrative districts.

items.name: 磨崖仏
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.description: 1709年に松本家（葛尾大尽）の安泰と地域の安寧を祈って作られた。高さ5〜6mの大岩に十三仏のうち七体が刻まれている。

en.description_en: A cliff-carved Buddhist image (magaibutsu) classified as a historic site among monuments. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1975-06-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Shikiibata.

items.name: イチイ
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A Japanese yew (ichii) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1975-06-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Nakashimizu.

items.name: 宇佐の杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 野川字南仲ノ内71（八幡神社）

en.description_en: A Japanese cedar (sugi) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1975-06-05. It is located at Nogawa Aza Minaminakanouchi 71 (Hachiman Shrine).

A shrine hall classified as a building among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1988-12-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba 100 (Isozaki Shrine).

items.name: 高御座の夫婦大杉
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A pair of great Japanese cedar (sugi) trees classified as a natural monument. They are village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1988-12-05. They are located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba 100 (Isozaki Shrine).

items.name: 薬師観音大尽墓石群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Gravestone group of the Yakushi Kannon magnate
en.description_en: A group of gravestones classified as a historic site among monuments. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1988-12-05. It is located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba 100 (Isozaki Shrine).

en.name_en: Statue of Dainichi Nyorai of the Diamond Realm
en.description_en: A Buddhist statue of Dainichi Nyorai classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

en.name_en: Hanging scroll of the nirvana image
en.description_en: A hanging scroll depicting the nirvana of the Buddha, classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

The Great Prajnaparamita Sutra in 600 volumes, classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

en.name_en: Rishubun sutra of the Great Prajnaparamita Sutra
en.description_en: The Rishubun section of the Great Prajnaparamita Sutra, classified as an art and craft object among tangible cultural properties. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 1995-07-14. It is located at Katsurao Aza Kitadaira 11 (Yakushi-ji).

items.name: 種蒔桜（関場）
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A cherry tree known as the sowing cherry (tanemaki-zakura), classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Nogawa Aza Sekiba.

items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

items.name: しだれ桜
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Katsurao Aza Sekiba.

items.name: 大尽屋敷跡のしだれ桜
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_en: Weeping cherry at the magnate's residence site
en.description_en: A weeping cherry (shidarezakura) tree classified as a natural monument. It is village-designated by Katsurao Village, with designation dated 2008-06-18. It is located at Katsurao Aza Shikiibata.

items.location: 野川字南仲ノ内71（八幡神社）

items.location: 野川字南仲ノ内71（八幡神社）
